name_cn:
#Medium Signature Tote Bag 'Pink'
This Signature Tote Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from pink calfskin with tonal grained calfskin details, it features a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. A spacious compartment with a snap button and leather strap closure safely holds daily essentials, with a slip pocket for added refinement. The medium style comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy hand, shoulder, or crossbody carrying.
Calfskin metal snap button and leather strap closure
Top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal slip pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 24x21x14cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick
